mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT 1 FROM message_conversation mc JOIN chat_message cm ON cm.conversation_id = mc.id
mc.category = #{category}
mc.category IN ('공지', '이벤트')
GROUP BY mc.category, cm.content, cm.sender_id, DATE_FORMAT(mc.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') ) t
SELECT user_id FROM users WHERE role = 'TRAINER' AND is_active = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT u.user_id AS userId, up.name AS name FROM users u JOIN user_profiles up ON u.user_id = up.user_id WHERE u.role = 'TRAINER' AND u.is_active = 1 AND u.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY up.name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message_conversation (member_id, trainer_id, category, created_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{trainerId}, #{category}, NOW())
INSERT INTO chat_message (conversation_id, sender_id, content, is_read, created_at) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{senderId}, #{content}, 0, NOW())
